summary: SentCom Unified Component - All 14 Features Verified Successfully. Backend tests (17/17 passed) and Frontend UI tests (100% pass) confirm full integration of Bot Brain + AI Assistant into SentCom.

minor.issue: Returns success=false with fallback message when orchestrator is initializing (transient state)

sentcom_chat.details: Chat input visible, accepts messages, AI responses appear in stream with 'SENTCOM' label

quick_action_performance.details: Performance button visible and clickable, triggers analysis via /api/sentcom/chat

quick_action_news.details: News button visible and clickable, triggers market news query

quick_action_brief.details: Brief button visible, calls /api/assistant/coach/morning-briefing, returns 3-point coaching

quick_action_rules.details: Rules button visible, calls /api/assistant/coach/rule-reminder, returns trading rule reminder

quick_action_summary.details: Summary button visible, calls /api/assistant/coach/daily-summary, returns watchlist and coaching

check_trade_form.details: Check Trade button opens form with Symbol, Entry $, Stop $ fields and BUY/SELL selector

check_trade_submit.details: Form submission calls /api/assistant/coach/check-rules and /api/assistant/coach/position-size, returns rule analysis and sizing

bot_start_stop.details: Stop/Start button toggles bot state, confirmed via /api/trading-bot/stop and /api/trading-bot/start

bot_mode_change.details: Settings panel shows 3 modes (Autonomous, Confirmation, Paused), mode changes confirmed via /api/trading-bot/mode/{mode}

stream_messages.details: Live Team Stream shows user messages ('YOU' label) and AI responses ('SENTCOM' label) with timestamps

positions_display.details: 'Our Positions' panel visible with $0.00 total P&L, shows 'No open positions' when empty

setups_display.details: 'Setups We're Watching' panel visible, shows 'No setups currently' when empty

order_pipeline.details: Header shows Pending (0), Executing (0), Filled (0) counts with arrow indicators

critical_code_review_comments: SentCom.jsx: useTradingBotControl hook properly integrates with /api/trading-bot/* endpoints
SentCom.jsx: Quick actions correctly route to either /api/sentcom/chat (for Performance, News) or specific coaching endpoints
SentCom.jsx: handleCheckTrade calls both check-rules and position-size endpoints in parallel with Promise.all
SentCom.jsx: localMessages state properly tracks user/assistant messages for immediate display
sentcom_service.py: _ensure_we_voice() transforms 'I' language to 'we' language for team partnership feel

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are real backend implementations connected to IB, Ollama, Alpaca

context_for_next_testing_agent: SentCom unified component fully tested - all Bot Brain and AI Assistant functionality integrated. Trading bot controls (start/stop, mode changes) working. All 6 quick actions (Performance, News, Brief, Rules, Summary, Check Trade) functional. Chat functionality with AI agents working. Positions, Setups, and Order Pipeline displays working. IB Gateway shows OFFLINE in preview environment (expected).
